introSection: Cannonball Run was a wooden roller coaster located at Waterville USA in Gulf Shores, Alabama, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Cannonball Run opened in 1995.

On June 26, 2018, the park announced that Cannonball Run would close at the end of the 2018 season. President of Waterville USA Joe Warrington said the removal would "make room for even more exciting attractions" however a replacement has not been announced. The last day of operation was September 30.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had an out and back layout. It was built over a parking lot and had openings in the lift hill structure to allow traffic to pass.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train was built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters, Inc.

fullText:
Cannonball Run was a wooden roller coaster located at Waterville USA in Gulf Shores, Alabama, USA.

Cannonball Run opened in 1995.

On June 26, 2018, the park announced that Cannonball Run would close at the end of the 2018 season. President of Waterville USA Joe Warrington said the removal would "make room for even more exciting attractions" however a replacement has not been announced. The last day of operation was September 30.

The ride had an out and back layout. It was built over a parking lot and had openings in the lift hill structure to allow traffic to pass.

The train was built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters, Inc.
